creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
falling for autumn ✨🍂🍁🌿🏞️✨ with the most beautiful crystal clear, multi-coloured lakes, waterfalls & lush forest ✨ 

📍this is #jiuzhaigou 🇨🇳 a #unescoworldheritage nature reserve in #sichuan #china #九寨沟 

this valley of nine village refers to the nine Tibetan villages within its boundaries & it is a nature lovers paradise. 

my parents went there 20 years ago & it’s their favourite destination in China, I am glad I step foot there & now I am obsessed with the amazing scenery, you definitely need a whole full day to explore the many lakes & stunning scenery there. best time to visit in October 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #chinatravel #四川 #中国 #autumninchina #travelbloggers

transcription.text: អស្របីប់ក្រារួល្រ្មាំះះ។ អារើមីត្រាល្យី្រារត់ក្រារួន់ល្មាន់ក្រក្រាន់ល្រ។ អារើម្រូមំប្រក្រារត់ក្រាល្រារក្រ។
